programme.title: Blue Lagoon Boat
programme.desc: Arguably one of the most relaxing scenes one can imagine, this 1-hour long static nature scene filmed from a remote island on the northern tip of Mexico's Yucatan Peninsula is perfect for transforming any digital screen into a relaxing window to the sea. On top of perfect puffy clouds passing, you'll enjoy lapsing lagoon waves and the sights & sounds of seagulls.

programme.title: Nacpan Beach
programme.desc: Travel to a beautiful stretch of cream-colored sand with swaying coconut palms and clear waters.

programme.title: Dazzling Blue Lakeshore
programme.desc: Relax for one full hour on the stunningly blue shoreline of New Zealand's famous Lake Pukaki and enjoy the mesmerizing sights of blue water illuminating, clouds, and waves. Filmed in January 2017 on New Zealand's South Island.

programme.title: Islands of Paradise
programme.desc: Transform any TV or digital screen into a window to the beautiful Yasawa islands of Fiji, with this one hour-long, soothing visual journey. Palm trees, tropical lagoons, birds chirping, waves lapping, golden sunsets and fiery sunrises are just a few of the scenes in store for the viewer. Enjoy nearly all the benefits of a relaxing tropical vacation from the comfort of your home!

programme.title: Spectacular Setting Sun
programme.desc: Nothing is more beautiful than the brilliant setting of the sun as it sinks behind the mountains of the Laurentians.

programme.title: Blue Lagoon Boat
programme.desc: Arguably one of the most relaxing scenes one can imagine, this 1-hour long static nature scene filmed from a remote island on the northern tip of Mexico's Yucatan Peninsula is perfect for transforming any digital screen into a relaxing window to the sea. On top of perfect puffy clouds passing, you'll enjoy lapsing lagoon waves and the sights & sounds of seagulls.

programme.title: Lake Tahoe Shoreline Rocks
programme.desc: Transport yourself to the iconic crystal blue shoreline of Lake Tahoe as you let your feet soak in the cool healing waters along a rugged rocky point. Listen as the sound of the water splashing on the rocks washes away any worries you might have, and then as you expand your horizons, notice the distant stunning snow covered peaks and occasional water-goers. This fixed-angle scene was captured on the eastern shoreline of Lake Tahoe and is presented in 4K resolution for maximum immersion.

programme.title: Summer Fun II
programme.desc: Summer Fun E2: Sizzling, relaxing visuals for the warmest season of the year.

programme.title: Summer Fun: Harborscapes
programme.desc: Summer Fun E3: Harborscapes — A vibrant mix of paintings, photography, and mixed media artworks celebrating the charm of boats, docks, and serene harbor towns—inviting viewers to drift into sun-soaked coastal adventures and the laid-back joys of summer by the sea.

programme.title: Happy Hour
programme.desc: Happy Hour E3: Oktoberfest — Immerse yourself in the lively spirit of Oktoberfest and the camaraderie of happy hour. With a blend of vivid colors and intricate details, this art collection transports you to bustling beer gardens, traditional attire, and clinking glasses.

programme.title: Happy Hour IV
programme.desc: Happy Hour E4 — This art collection masterfully captures life's vibrancy, alive with the exuberant energy of happy hour. Each piece dances with color and movement complementing the refreshing and illuminative mid-tempo tunes of strings, keys, synth leads, and bass.

programme.title: Happy Hour
programme.desc: Fashion Edge E1 — Step into a realm of electrifying fashion and avant-garde creativity with this high-energy collection. Unleashing the boundless imagination with cutting-edge art that redefines fashion's limits and leaves an indelible mark on the world of style.

programme.title: Featured Artists
programme.desc: Colors of Pride E1 ⚊ Artwork collected in celebration of LGBTQ pride.

programme.title: Featured Artists
programme.desc: Diverse Perspectives: Hispanic Artists Now E3 — This art collection of real & imagined landscapes, soulful abstract work, & vivid surrealist portraits offers a colorful exploration Hispanic culture. The music includes rhythmic electro, percussive afro-beats, & soft-house with a modern Latin edge.

programme.title: Featured Artist: Varvara Alay
programme.desc: Featured Artist: Varvara Alay — Explore the mesmerizing world of Varvara Alay, an award-winning graphic designer and illustrator. Her bold colors, surreal motifs, and intricate patterns blend fantasy and realism, creating endlessly fascinating, dreamlike realms filled with elaborate characters and majestic designs.
